Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx basic,$0801,$ffff "SKRAMBLE-RABBIT-07D4-2388" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $07d4 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Skramble (Rabbit Software).prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $07D4 to setup required low memory values
